title: Nait's Amarite
description: Just a texturepack I made for AmyMialee's Amarite mod from the Content SMP Including .Json File tuning and an animated sword texture!
body:
_**A Resourcepack made for the 1.19.2 version of the [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite) mod by Amy mailee. **_

Please DM me with any problems, or if you are the creator of the mod and would like this to be taken down <3

My first upload!!

![Nait Holding Amarite Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de851057272f9826a9fa01d59ee91fe459c003bb.png)

![Holding styles with statues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/396bee8527de656519cb4aefa6697760ec4b33a4.png)

**With animated texture!**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

_(Animation is much smoother in game, max image size prevents better framerate)_

</details>

![Animated Amarite Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b4887192348d0017cb0419b9d8fe9bbfdc08e9.gif)
